'''''Plank''''' was a [[Hurrim]] [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]]. It was destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] while defending the besieged [[Hurrim Base]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1999-05-03 -->[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
